basic_details.job_title: MoEF&CC Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEF&CC)
basic_details.short_information: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEF&CC) has released the official Research Associate Recruitment 2026 notification for 4 vacancies under Advt. No. F. No. 17/56/2022-FPD. Candidates holding a Master’s Degree in Chemistry or B.E./B.Tech in Chemical Engineering with a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience are eligible to apply. The recruitment is being conducted on a contractual basis with a monthly salary of ₹40,000. Interested candidates can submit their applications through email mode on or before 12 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree in Chemistry OR B.E./B.Tech in Chemical Engineering, Minimum three (03) years relevant experience
qualification.details: Master’s Degree in Chemistry OR B.E./B.Tech in Chemical Engineering. Minimum three (03) years of relevant experience. Desirable: Course in Occupational Health / Industrial Safety, Good knowledge of MS Office and drafting skills.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MoEF&CC Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MoEF&CC Research Associate positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 12th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s Degree in Chemistry OR a B.E./B.Tech in Chemical Engineering with a minimum of three years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 65 years. Specific age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Research Associate position announced by the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Research Associate post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the MoEF&CC Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Associate positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate positions will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Research Associate positions?
faq.answer: The Research Associate positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
